original:
A holo of the complex spins in ghostly form in the shared visual workspace.

Your tools are multitude. All you really need to do is get yourself invited into the inner sanctum.
translated:
Un hologramme du complexe tourne sous forme spectrale dans l'espace visuel partagé.

Vos outils sont légion. Tout ce que vous avez vraiment à faire, c'est vous faire inviter dans le sanctuaire intérieur.

original: "A snoop?" Bornanew asks, "Is this some sort of hack? Would that even be possible? One presumes that the administrator of a Persean League polity can afford the best computer security."
translated: "Un espion ?" demande Bornanew. "C'est une sorte de piratage ? Est-ce que ce serait seulement possible ? On présume que l'administrateur d'une entité politique de la Ligue Perséenne peut se permettre la meilleure sécurité informatique."

original:
"Well. Menes likes you," he says. "He likes people who are rich and exciting, and important. He wants you to like him. He wants to be associated with people who are like what he imagines you are."

"Offering to buy his 'relic'... he would like that, I think."
translated:
"Eh bien. Menes vous apprécie," dit-il. "Il aime les gens riches, passionnants et importants. Il veut que vous l'aimiez. Il veut être associé à des gens qui correspondent à ce qu'il imagine que vous êtes."

"Proposer d'acheter sa 'relique'... ça lui plairait, je pense."

original:
"To what end? We want Menes to reveal from whom he acquired the duplicate." He taps his notebook, thinking. Then looks back at you.

"What if you were a buyer."
translated:
"Dans quel but ? Nous voulons que Menes révèle de qui il a acquis le duplicata." Il tapote son carnet, pensif. Puis il vous regarde à nouveau.

"Et si vous étiez un acheteur."

original: "Menes likes you," he says. "He likes people who are rich and exciting. He wants you to like him. I suspect he could be persuaded to reveal his source. Or, if not, we could discover it if we had possession of the false relic..."
translated: "Menes vous apprécie," dit-il. "Il aime les gens riches et passionnants. Il veut que vous l'aimiez. Je soupçonne qu'on pourrait le persuader de révéler sa source. Ou, sinon, nous pourrions la découvrir si nous avions la fausse relique en notre possession..."

option_line: bffi_mmBornBuyerOpt3:"Buy the relic from Menes? That could be expensive."
original: Buy the relic from Menes? That could be expensive.
translated: Acheter la relique à Menes ? Cela pourrait être coûteux.

original: "It could be," he says. "And before you ask, the Church will not approve additional funding. The Reverend Archcurate herself has spent her covert budget too freely on my case already."
translated: "C'est possible," dit-il. "Et avant que vous ne demandiez, l'Église n'approuvera pas de financement supplémentaire. La Révérende Archicuratrice elle-même a déjà trop dépensé son budget secret pour mon affaire."

option_line: bffi_mmBornBuyerCheat:"Are you... proposing that I cheat Menes Yaribay?"
original: Are you... proposing that I cheat Menes Yaribay?
translated: Êtes-vous... en train de proposer que j'escroque Menes Yaribay ?
